name: Grounded Body Bar Calming Lavender Coconut Avocado 150g
shortDescription: Enriched with calming and nourishing goodness. This luxurious bar gently cleanses and hydrates your skin, leaving it feeling soft, supple, and irresistibly touchable. Leaves your skin and hair feeling deeply nourished and moisturized.
